forecasts.detailed: Areas of fog between 11pm and 4am, then areas of fog and a slight chance of rain. Cloudy, with a low around 41. Southeast wind 0 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

Patchy fog between 9pm and 1am, then patchy drizzle and patchy fog between 1am and 5am, then patchy drizzle and patchy fog and a slight chance of rain showers. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 44. Southeast wind 2 to 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

Rain showers after midnight. Mostly cloudy. Low around 37, with temperatures rising to around 50 overnight. South wind 14 to 18 mph, with gusts as high as 36 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

Rain showers after 10pm. Mostly cloudy. Low around 40, with temperatures rising to around 53 overnight. South wind 6 to 14 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.
